evidence: low win rate (40%) suggests caution in LONG positions.
raw_rule: IF direction == 'LONG' AND confidence < 0.6 THEN reduce_position_size BECAUSE low win rate (40%) suggests caution in LONG positions.

evidence: recent losses (-$1.46) indicate a need for temporary risk reduction.
raw_rule: IF net_PnL < -$2.00 THEN stop_trading_for_1_hour BECAUSE recent losses (-$1.46) indicate a need for temporary risk reduction.

condition: RULE_001 has triggered 3 times in the last 10 trades
evidence: repeated boosting of confidence without significant improvement in win rate may indicate an ineffective rule.
raw_rule: IF RULE_001 has triggered 3 times in the last 10 trades THEN adjust_RULE_001_condition BECAUSE repeated boosting of confidence without significant improvement in win rate may indicate an ineffective rule.
